title: NGS Library Prep for Targeted Sequencing of DNA Methylation Patterns
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Extraction and clean-up of cell-free DNA...
steps.instruction: Extraction and clean-up of cell-free DNA from 96 plasma or saliva patient specimens. Links: * [Part

steps.title: Pooling](http://protocols
steps.instruction: Pooling](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pooling) With this protocol, your robot will use reagents from the Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit [Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/ez-dna-methylation-gold-kits) to perform the custom steps (DNA extraction, Bisulfite Conversion, PCR1, PCR2, Pooling) detailed in the HKG SOP.[HKG SOP](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-04/vw23kchHKG%20Standard%20Operating%20Procedure%20for%20DNA%20extraction%20Targeted%20next%20generation%20sequencing%20and%20.xlsx). This is part 1 of the protocol: DNA Extraction. This step performs the extraction and bead-clean up of 96 patient samples (plasma or saliva) listed in the sample manifest and follows the HKG SOP described above. A current sample manifest can be uploaded and integrated into this protocol by using the "Uploaded CSV Copy of Sample Manifest" parameter below. The OT-2 will read the sample type and sample volume from the uploaded manifest and then set up and perform the experimental steps accordingly. After the steps carried out in this protocol (part 1), proceed with part

steps.title: Distribute premix and sample to the DNA extraction plates
steps.instruction: Distribute premix and sample to the DNA extraction plates.

steps.title: Remove bead supernatants, combine beads from...
steps.instruction: Remove bead supernatants, combine beads from DNA extraction plate and duplicate plate, wash beads, elute and transfer eluate to fresh PCR plate.
